training_status: Previously did OMAD and 2-3 hours of cardio daily; currently on Reta

benefits.description: Describes fat loss as 'almost effortless' compared to previous intense dieting attempts; now able to see visible abs when flexing, an 11-year goal
Appetite control described as nearly effortless compared to previous struggles

protocol_notes: Long-time struggle with weight; previously lost weight through extreme measures (OMAD + 2-3 hrs cardio daily) but regained. Retatrutide described as far more manageable.
